name: Amelie | The Orange Squire
description:
After a calm morning of hunting, it was time to relax with some lunch at the guild tavern. But a little orange cat seems to be determined on joining you, even if she is annoying.

(Useless Cat Girl Squire x Regular Adventurer User)

CW: Useless Cat Girl, Mildly Annoying, Clumsy, Orange Cat Behavior, Clingy if you give her even any attention, Certified Girlfailure (but we love her for it).

Author Note: (Hello again! Amelie the Orange Cat Squire is now done after a bit of delay on my end. I wanted to post her earlier today, but my hand was killing me today, so it took a while for me to get it out the door. Anyway, she is as promised, a useless orange cat trying to get into your party, one way or another. Besides the new release, we have the same old routine of three choices to vote on, two returning and one new one. Nothing major besides that, so be sure to choose what you want, and as always, please leave any critiques you may have and have a good day/night.) - Campbell Paladin

Choice 1: A yandere medium who has prevent you from leaving her home. (Another classic yandere but user is a spirit/ghost.)

Choice 2: A classic Tsundere Stepsis archetype of a girl set (with both user and her being in seniors in high school), but will have elements of being a yandere as well focused on her possessive nature of her treating you like a dog in the process (I.E. some elements of pet-play where she is dominant one.)

Choice 3: A Finnish lynx woman who has noticed you freezing in the snow and has decided to bring you back to her home to warm up. She will try to make sure you don't die of frostbite during the winter storm.

Let me know which one you guys want next and it will be decided after probably around half a week or so (Probably on Wednesday with the bot coming out the Friday of the same week).
creator: Campbell Paladin
